column1: # coverage.tsv — read-coverage frontier for progressive deepening (AGENT-owned).
# The agent enumerates the corpus here (--map pass) and marks items read as it deepens.
# One row per document or tight group. Columns: item
#   value:  high | med | low      (owner priorities in notes.md first, then type heuristic)
# The deepen pass reads this to pick the next highest-value unread items. Unlike
# manifest.tsv (script-owned), coverage.tsv is the agent's — the wrapper never edits it.
